## Checklist

- [ ] I've read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] The app/tool is currently active and accessible
- [ ] I've included: name, link, key features, pricing, and platforms
- [ ] Entry is in alphabetical order within its section
- [ ] Links are working (no 404s)
- [ ] Pricing information is current
